_read_me: This is the durable, checkable validation-state record referenced by docs/release-validation-plan.md's 'Validation State Tracking' section. Read that section before editing this file by hand. Never hand-wave an entry as validated: every non-null commit/date/validator/evidence_ref below must correspond to a real, completed validation run with real evidence (command output, CI run URL, or a PR/issue comment quoting it) -- see the proposed AG-VAL-028 rule in the docs/release-validation-plan.md PR body. This file is intentionally seeded with 'never validated' placeholders; it must not be pre-filled with a fabricated pass.

last_stack_validation.summary: Not yet validated under this tracking mechanism. Run the Stack half of docs/release-validation-plan.md and record the result here.

last_ci_validation.validator: claude-agent (Part A CI validation pass, real Linux self-hosted runner host)
last_ci_validation.summary: Real Part A (CI) pass against the frozen v0.3.0 branch tip (identical content to current_dev at this commit): cargo fmt/check(-D warnings)/clippy(-D warnings)/test PASS for all three crates (ui 353 tests, dns/nats-subscriber 49 tests, pxe-client-probe 4 tests) on real Linux via the same rustup-stable toolchain CI itself installs. dhcp-relay-flow-simulation.sh PASS (real two-segment DORA relay proof). nats-secondary-auth-callout-simulation.sh run twice against locally-built images pinned to this exact commit (ghcr.io nightly was stale/behind at run time): positive control PASS (connz-polled active-disconnect #681, xkv1 encryption marker #682 with no plaintext JWT marker), negative control (xkey removed) correctly FAILED with the expected plaintext-marker error. check-vex-drift.sh PASS + negative control (mutated .trivyignore.yaml) correctly failed with a real diff. setup_update_idempotence.bats guard PASS + negative control (NTP_ENABLED removed) correctly failed naming that key. shellcheck: 0 findings. bats tests/bats: 714/715 pass -- the 1 real failure (check-bats-path-filter-coverage.sh's own self-test) was root-caused to a genuine gap (dnsmasq-relay.conf.template missing from build-tools.yml's path filters) and fixed in PR #1209, re-verified there (0 gaps after fix). shellspec: 3/3 pass. actionlint (default invocation, matching CI's own exact 'Run ShellCheck and ActionLint' step): FAILED to complete -- hung indefinitely, reproduced 3/3 times at this commit; corroborated by a real, independently-stuck CI job (shellcheck job on PR feat/681-nats-active-disconnect, in_progress 5+ hours using the actual published ghcr.io build-tools image, not a local-build artifact). Disabling the embedded shellcheck integration (-shellcheck=) completes in 0.017s with 0 findings, so the workflow YAML content itself is clean; the check as CI currently invokes it is not reliably completing. Not exercised in this pass (explicitly deferred, not silently assumed passing): DHCP-Kea and dnsmasq-ProxyDHCP live E2E simulations (dhcp-kea-lease-flow-simulation, dhcp-proxy-pxe-simulation), DNS live dig-based resolution and setup-reset-dns-config-simulation.sh, check-workflow-service-lists.sh, Admin UI/watchdog live Part B stack checks (out of Part A CI scope by design), governance-doc manual review beyond the plan-doc fix itself.
last_ci_validation.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 (full command transcript in the PR description and first comment); https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1209 (ci-build-tools path-filter-coverage gap: before/after command output)

subsystem_validation._note: path_prefixes mirror scripts/classify-image-impact.sh's real touches_prefix() rules (the same classifier build-push.yml's detect-changes job and the promote job's version-bump logic both already consume) so staleness can be computed the same way CI already reasons about relevance, instead of a second, drifting definition. A subsystem entry is stale the moment `git log <its last commit>..HEAD -- <its path_prefixes>` is non-empty, OR whenever AGENTS.md/.github/AGENTS.md changed (see 'full_invalidation_triggers' below), OR whenever the recorded commit itself predates last_stack_validation/last_ci_validation's own commit for that layer.

dhcp-kea.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- PARTIAL: dhcp_kea_config_generation.bats and dhcp_lease_flow_parsing.bats pass (part of the 714/715 bats run). The live dhcp-kea-lease-flow-simulation E2E job (full-setup-sims.yml) was NOT re-run in this pass -- not exercised, not assumed passing.

dhcp-dnsmasq.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- dnsmasq-relay mode: scripts/dhcp-relay-flow-simulation.sh run for real, PASS (client offered 192.168.60.55 from the client-subnet pool via the relay's giaddr across two isolated bridge networks). dnsmasq ProxyDHCP: dhcp_proxy_known_good_snapshot.bats/dhcp_proxy_optional_directives.bats/setup_dhcp_mode.bats pass (part of the 714/715 bats run); the live dhcp-proxy-pxe-simulation E2E job was NOT re-run in this pass.

dns-pdns.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- PARTIAL: dns_zone_generation.bats/dns_known_good_snapshot.bats/dns_config_snapshot_idempotence.bats pass (part of the 714/715 bats run), and services/dns/nats-subscriber crate's own fmt/check/clippy/test all pass (49 tests). Live dig-based resolution and setup-reset-dns-config-simulation.sh were NOT re-run in this pass -- not exercised, not assumed passing.

nats.note: NATS has no dedicated classify-image-impact.sh key -- its functional surface spans the ui, setup_runtime, and deploy classifier keys. Treat a change as NATS-relevant if it touches any prefix above, not only a single classifier boolean.
nats.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- scripts/nats-secondary-auth-callout-simulation.sh run twice against locally-built images pinned to this exact commit (ghcr.io nightly was stale at run time, so a published-tag run would not have validated this commit). Positive control PASS: per-secondary credential isolation, rotation invalidates old credential, active disconnect confirmed via real connz polling (#681), xkv1 sealed-box marker present with no plaintext JWT marker (#682). Negative control (xkey line removed from a scratch docker-compose.yml) correctly FAILED with the exact expected plaintext-marker error, proving the check discriminates real encryption.

admin-ui.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- PARTIAL: services/ui crate's own fmt/check(-D warnings)/clippy(-D warnings)/test all pass (353 tests, incl. nats_auth_callout, watchdog_status, dhcp routes, secondary-registration modules), and the NATS simulation above drives real Admin UI HTTP routes (session/CSRF, secondary registration/rotation/removal). Live dashboard/cache-resize Part B checks (nginx -T rendered-config proof, watchdog dashboard green/red transitions) were NOT run -- out of this Part A CI pass's scope by design, not assumed passing.

watchdog.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- watchdog_test CI job's own checks reproduced directly (bash -n services/watchdog/watchdog.sh; test -x): PASS. Extensive watchdog.sh bats coverage (maybe_purge, maybe_prune_syslog, check_and_maybe_restart nats, write_status convergence, etc.) all pass as part of the 714/715 bats run. Live hung-container-detection Part B check (external SIGSTOP + StartedAt proof) NOT run in this pass.

ci-build-tools.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 (full transcript) and https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1209 (the fix + before/after check-bats-path-filter-coverage.sh output) -- MIXED result, recorded honestly rather than rounded to a single pass/fail: check-bats-path-filter-coverage.sh FAILED against the unmodified v0.3.0/current_dev tree (2 real gaps, services/dhcp-proxy/dnsmasq-relay.conf.template missing from both path-filter lists) -- fixed in PR #1209, re-verified there (0 gaps after). shellcheck PASSED (0 findings, repo-wide). actionlint FAILED to complete as CI actually invokes it (default embedded-shellcheck invocation hangs indefinitely, reproduced 3/3 times; corroborated by an independently-stuck real CI job using the published ghcr.io image, not a local-build artifact); with the embedded shellcheck integration disabled (-shellcheck=, a deviation from CI's real invocation) it completes in 0.017s with 0 findings, so the workflow YAML content itself is not known to be wrong, but the check as CI runs it is not reliably completing right now. check-workflow-service-lists.sh was NOT run in this pass. bats/shellspec smoke-tests of the build-tools image itself: 714/715 and 3/3 respectively (see nats/dhcp-dnsmasq entries for the one real bats failure, which is this same path-filter gap).

governance-sbom.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- check-vex-drift.sh reports vex.openvex.json in sync with .trivyignore.yaml (PASS); generate-vex.sh | jq empty produces valid JSON; negative control (a scratch copy of .trivyignore.yaml with an injected fake CVE entry) correctly made the drift guard FAIL with a real, readable diff, proving the guard still discriminates a genuine mismatch. AGENTS.md/.github/AGENTS.md unchanged since #1205, so no governance full-invalidation trigger fired in this pass.

setup-runtime.evidence_ref: https://github.com/wiki-mod/lancache-ng/pull/1213 -- tests/bats/setup_update_idempotence.bats's migrate_env_for_update() key-drift guard (first @test) PASSES on a clean checkout; negative control (NTP_ENABLED removed from write_converged_env_fixture() in a scratch copy of the test file) correctly FAILS, naming exactly 'NTP_ENABLED' as the missing key. scripts/dhcp-relay-flow-simulation.sh (also under scripts/) covered under dhcp-dnsmasq above. Other scripts/ entries (check-workflow-service-lists.sh, check-idempotence-test-coverage.sh, etc.) NOT individually re-run in this pass.

full_invalidation_triggers: AGENTS.md or .github/AGENTS.md changed since the recorded commit (governance change can redefine what 'correct' means for every subsystem, not just one)

The diff since the recorded commit could not be reconstructed (force-push discarding the old tip, an unreachable base, or any case classify-image-impact.sh itself would fall back to --all-changed for) -- treat as fully stale rather than guessing
The recorded commit is not an ancestor of the commit under test (a rebase/history-rewrite happened) -- re-derive the diff from a real merge-base, do not assume the old record still applies
